_comment: Backfill of EPTSS Round 29 — 'Right Back To It' by Waxahatchee ft. MJ Lenderman. Dates sourced from roundMetadata row id=526, slug=2026-01-01. covers_due and listening_party are identical in the DB; collapsed into a single closing-event milestone. Note: without a submission-deadline milestone, atjam's generic deriveState will report this round as perpetually open; EPTSS UI uses its own derivation.
name: Round 29
assignment: Record your cover of 'Right Back To It' by Waxahatchee (ft. MJ Lenderman) by the submission deadline. Any arrangement, any instrumentation — make it yours.
